hub_subtitle: Business English para as reuniões com o time Global da Sanofi, congressos médicos e a apresentação de agosto

lesson.menu_title: What Happened Last Quarter? -- Reporting Past Results
lesson.menu_desc: Telling the Global team what happened: targets, challenges and opportunities of the last quarter -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- What Happened Last Quarter?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Emmanuele Orrico | Aula 3 -- What Happened Last Quarter?

listenings.text: Hello Emmanuele. Marc Dubois again, from Paris. I looked at your numbers this morning, and I have three questions for August. Number one. What happened with the asthma target last quarter? Number two. What did your team do in market access? And number three. Where did the growth come from? Please do not prepare fifty slides. Three answers. Three sentences each. Last quarter we achieved. Last quarter we missed. Last quarter we learned. That is all I need. Thank you.

Good afternoon, everyone. My name is Claire Bennett, from the global immunology team, and welcome to the quarterly business review. Before the country presentations, here are the global numbers for the last quarter. We exceeded the target in dermatology by six percent. We achieved ninety-four percent of the target in respiratory. And we missed the target in one market, because market access was slower than we expected. The growth came from the private market, and prescription volume went up in four countries. Once in a while, we have a difficult quarter. This was not one of them. Brazil, you are first. The floor is yours.

extra_audio.text: In April, we started the quarter with a clear target. In May, my team met sixty new doctors in the private market. In June, prescription volume grew and we exceeded the target in dermatology. At the end of the quarter, we missed the target in asthma, because market access was slow. Last week, I presented the results to the Global team.

items.situation: "So, how was last quarter for Brazil?"
tips: Last quarter was good. We achieved our target in dermatology.
It was a busy quarter, but we exceeded the target.

items.situation: "Did you reach the target in asthma?"
tips: No, we missed the target in asthma.
We did not achieve the target, because market access was slow.
The growth came from the private market.
Prescription volume went up in the private market.
The biggest challenge was market access in the public market.
We faced a challenge with market access.

items.situation: "And the opportunity for the next quarter?"
tips: We met sixty new doctors last quarter. That is our opportunity.
The opportunity is the private market.

items.situation: The Global VP says the numbers go up and down every quarter. Answer, and use the expression from today.
tips: Yes. Once in a while, we have unexpected results.
Once in a while, a quarter is difficult. Then we learn and we move.
